steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Left of the blank: 'students can sign up' is an independent clause with a modal verb and phrasal verb. Right of the blank: 'the world famous Meisner acting technique' is a noun phrase.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive construction
steps.content:
The correct construction is 'sign up to [infinitive]' to express purpose. Choice A, 'to learn,' fits this pattern, creating 'students can sign up to learn the technique.' B uses past tense, C uses present progressive, and D omits 'to.'

That matches choice A — A is correct.
